NO tier change here: B1 stays T6 CONDITIONAL on {H-LAYER, H-ADM-COH, SC-SCOPE}; whether the integration discharges H-ADM-COH (residuals: subpolynomial-K, modeling, corner) is an operator decision. | H-ADM-COH DISCHARGE-CANDIDATE 2026-06-08 (R-028, dr2-hadmcoh-discharge-decision v1.0): for the crystallographic competitor class the finite margin K_adm <= K_allowed(n)=8+4sqrt(14)sqrt(n) is verified (10.6x-15.8x), so H-ADM-COH (which only secured G1'''-AE via angular separation) may be discharged, reducing the B1 hypothesis set {H-LAYER,H-ADM-COH,SC-SCOPE} -> {H-LAYER,SC-SCOPE}. Tier UNCHANGED T6 (hypothesis reduction strengthens). H-ADM-COH retained as legacy fallback for non-lattice competitors; arbitrary-Q DR-2 OPEN. DA self-test: (i) competitor class is the physical lattice class - covered; (ii) margin robust to O(1) c_R drift; (iii) no tier inflation - SIGN unchanged; (iv) G1'''-AE is exactly the STEP-5B weighted additive energy - confirmed in R-027. | SC-SCOPE LIFT ENACTED 2026-06-08 (operator-authorised; scscope-floor-sharpening v1.2, R-029, scscope_constant_map.py 3/3): active hypothesis set {H-LAYER,SC-SCOPE} -> {H-LAYER}. The reconciliation passed -- K_floor=sum_{t!=0}w_t^2/(lambda'I)^2 <= T'(M) PROVED (Parseval + Lemma A t!=0 part) + verified (K_floor/T'<=0.52, w_0=I), so the endpoint floor rho_lat>=6.55>=3.9 (paired>=2.28>1) and the floor obstruction is removed. DA self-test: (i) reconciliation proved+verified not just estimate; (ii) 3rd-cumulant inflation estimate-grade -> caveat documented, not hidden; (iii) no tier inflation (T6 stays, hypothesis reduced); (iv) lattice + separated regimes both close (T'<=67). B1 now rests on H-LAYER alone.
title: Reading-H selection within enumerated condensate ensembles
statement: Reading-H is selected among all admissible competitors of the H-ADM-COH amended class: $F_{\rm total}[P] > F_{\rm total}[R_H]$ at matched second-cumulant scope. Proof = case split — bulk via the layer margin (Proposition A, $m=+4.32\times10^{-3}$) plus the beyond-layer bound (STEP-5B closure, floors $\times59.4/\times8.8/\times2.6$); near-gap small-amplitude via the structural floor $F_{\rm fluct}[P]-F_{\rm fluct}[R_H]=\tfrac12\mathrm{Tr}[\ln(D_0+\lambda'P^2)-\ln D_0]\ge0$ (R-001/R-U10-3, unconditional). The T6 statement is the selection SIGN; quantitative margins remain estimator-grade (ESTIMATOR-UPGRADE).
scope: T6 CONDITIONAL on {H-LAYER} for the crystallographic momentum-shell (lattice) competitor class. SC-SCOPE LIFTED 2026-06-08 (operator-authorised on the reconciliation; R-029 v1.1, scscope_constant_map.py 3/3): the all-orders endpoint floor obstruction is PROVED removed (K_floor=sum_{t!=0}w_t^2/(lambda'I)^2 <= T'(M), so rho_lat>=6.55>=3.9, paired>=2.28>1), so the second-cumulant restriction is removed and the selection holds ALL-ORDERS -- with the third cumulant controlled at ESTIMATE-grade (R_s,R_q inflation 2.872, the operator-accepted basis, now uniform across all intensities). NOT rigorously proved at third order. H-ADM-COH DISCHARGED 2026-06-08 (operator decision; R-026/R-027/R-028): the lattice arithmetic secures the G1'''-AE additive-energy bound without angular separation, with finite margin K_adm<=K_allowed(n)=8+4sqrt(14)sqrt(n) (10.6x-15.8x), so H-ADM-COH leaves the active set (legacy fallback for hypothetical non-lattice competitors; arbitrary-Q DR-2 remains OPEN, not needed for the mainline). H-A0 was discharged earlier (H-ANCHOR verified-fact). Class-wide over the H-ADM-COH amended class; second-cumulant order; selection SIGN only. NOT unconditional (H-ADM-COH; unrestricted = DR-2 research-grade), NOT all-orders (SC-SCOPE substantive — third-cumulant endpoint marginal), the T6 claim is the selection SIGN, with the enumerated MARGINS now controlled-error continuum (ESTIMATOR-UPGRADE CLOSED@controlled-error 2026-06-07), mu^2-robust on [x0.5,x2] at second-cumulant order (ROBUSTNESS-MU2 CLOSED@[x0.5,x2]-2ND-CUMULANT), not all-orders. ROBUSTNESS-MU2 CLOSED@[x0.5,x2]-2ND-CUMULANT (exact m(mu^2) recomputed: min 0.945 m_anchor, derivative-sign min certificate at mu^2=0.0025, full-grid J_eff envelope <0.01%) for mu^2 in [x0.5,x2]: the selection is robust on this neighbourhood (STEP-5B margins x2.55..x60 recomputed off-anchor; A=0 uniqueness robust x0.2..x10; Prop-A floor preserved M_R/M_c>4.1). No longer strictly pinned to the exact anchor.
falsifier: An admissible competitor of the H-ADM-COH class with F_total <= F_total[R_H]; a near-gap section with the structural floor < 0; or the loss of the sole active named hypothesis {H-LAYER} (for the crystallographic lattice class; H-ADM-COH discharged + SC-SCOPE lifted 2026-06-08); or the third-order inflation estimate failing (would re-impose second-cumulant scope).
no_overclaim: T6 is the selection SIGN modulo four NAMED hypotheses, not an unconditional or all-orders result. SC-SCOPE is substantive (third-cumulant endpoint marginal); the enumerated margins are now controlled-error continuum (ESTIMATOR-UPGRADE CLOSED@controlled-error 2026-06-07, single+two-shell, strong-evidence); mu^2-robustness CLOSED@[x0.5,x2]-2ND-CUMULANT at second-cumulant order (ROBUSTNESS-MU2), not all-orders. The unrestricted-class selection is the DR-2 route (research-grade). No tier action on B5 (T5-CANDIDATE) by this note. TIER-LOGIC (operator review 2026-06-06): B1's T6 CONSUMES B5 / STEP-5B as the NAMED HYPOTHESIS H-ADM-COH (the amended-class closure condition / scope pin), NOT as a proved unconditional theorem -- this is what keeps B1 (T6) consistent with B5 (T5) under TSv2 §4.4 (a T6 claim may rest on a sub-T6 input promoted to a named hypothesis). B1 T6 reads: 'IF {H-LAYER, H-ADM-COH, SC-SCOPE} hold, then Reading-H is selected at matched second-cumulant scope.' B5 is never consumed here as an unconditional theorem. H-ADM-COH DISCHARGE ENACTED 2026-06-08 (operator decision, reviews/2026-06-08-hadmcoh-discharge-authorization.md): for the crystallographic lattice competitor class the active hypothesis set is now {H-LAYER, SC-SCOPE} -- H-ADM-COH is no longer an active assumption because the lattice additive-energy bound (R-026 T7) + the weighted bridge (R-027 T7) + the finite margin (R-028) secure G1'''-AE directly. Tier UNCHANGED at T6 (a hypothesis-set REDUCTION strengthens the conditional claim; the selection SIGN is unaffected). The discharge is scoped to the lattice class; arbitrary-Q DR-2 stays OPEN as a legacy fallback. SC-SCOPE LIFT ENACTED 2026-06-08 (operator-authorised on the reconciliation; reviews/2026-06-08-scscope-lift-authorization.md): the all-orders endpoint floor obstruction is PROVED removed (K_floor<=T'(M), scscope-floor-sharpening v1.2 + scscope_constant_map.py 3/3); the second-cumulant hypothesis SC-SCOPE is removed from the active set, leaving {H-LAYER}. Tier UNCHANGED T6 (a hypothesis-set reduction). HONEST CAVEAT: the all-orders selection's THIRD cumulant rests on the estimate-grade inflation (2.872; R_s,R_q), the operator-accepted basis -- NOT rigorously proved at third order. So B1's all-orders scope is selection-SIGN with the third cumulant at estimate-grade; the second-order floor + sign are rigorous.
next_action: Optional: promote the third-order inflation (R_s,R_q) from estimate-grade to proved to make the all-orders scope fully rigorous. B1 now rests on H-LAYER alone (the isotropic Gaussian-Hartree layer hypothesis).
